name: python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner
title: python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Designer module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Designer module
Qt Designer API provides the possibility of constructing user interfaces from
UI files at run-time.
.
This package contains the QtDesigner module of PyQt6 and the pyqt6 plugin for
Qt Designer.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner because Python bindings for Qt 6 Designer module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtdesigner --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
